reviews.comment:
Buena cafetería con dificultad para ingresar a los sanitarios, hay que estar pidiendo permiso y ser cliente. Espacio reducido para la carga de combustible.

(Translated by Google)
A good cafeteria with difficult access to the restrooms; you have to ask permission and be a customer. Limited space for fueling.

reviews.comment:
Ahí cargamos combustible y compramos bebidas frescas y pasamos al baño porque  yo pasaba de viaje a Villa de Soto

There we refueled and bought cold drinks and went to the bathroom because I was passing through on my way to Villa de Soto

reviews.comment:
Horrible atención la de los playeros, y no te permiten usar el baño, a menos que swas socio del ACA. Discriminacion total

(Translated by Google)
The service from the beach attendants is awful, and they won't let you use the restroom unless you're an ACA member. It's blatant discrimination.
